summary: Determines whether a string has a recognized file extension and returns the associated type or false.
signature_intent: Accepts a value expected to be a string containing a file extension or filename, and returns a mapped type value or false.
behavior: Returns false for non-string or empty input.
Extracts the final file extension from the input.
Returns the registered type value when the extension is recognized.
Returns false when the extension is missing or unrecognized.
edge_cases: Null, undefined, false, numbers, objects, and arrays return false.
Strings without an extension return false.
Uppercase or mixed-case extensions are normalized before matching.
Recognized extensions return their mapped value exactly.
